IKE Pipeline ›IKE Workspace Maven Plugin ›API Docs

  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CascadeWorkspaceMojo
    Compute the cascade (propagation set) from a changed component.
    CheckBranchMojo
    Defensive git hook — warns when a branch is created or switched outside the workspace tooling.
    CommitMojo
    Commit with a VCS bridge catch-up preamble.
    ComponentSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of a single workspace component at checkpoint time.
    DashboardWorkspaceMojo
    Composite workspace dashboard — one invocation, full overview.
    FeatureAbandonMojo
    Abandon a feature branch across all workspace components.
    FeatureFinishMergeMojo
    No-fast-forward merge of a feature branch, preserving full history.
    FeatureFinishRebaseMojo
    Rebase feature branch onto target, then fast-forward merge.
    FeatureFinishSquashMojo
    Squash-merge a feature branch back to the target branch.
    FeatureStartDryRunMojo
    Preview a coordinated feature branch creation without executing.
    FeatureStartMojo
    Start a coordinated feature branch across workspace components.
    GraphWorkspaceMojo
    Print the workspace dependency graph.
    InitWorkspaceMojo
    Clone and initialize workspace components from the manifest.
    PullWorkspaceMojo
    Pull latest changes across workspace components.
    PushMojo
    Push with a VCS bridge catch-up preamble.
    ReportMojo
    Open the cumulative workspace report in the default browser.
    StatusWorkspaceMojo
    Show git status across all workspace components.
    StignoreWorkspaceMojo
    Generate Syncthing .stignore files for the workspace.
    SyncMojo
    Reconcile git state after Syncthing delivers changes from another machine.
    VcsOperations
    Git and VCS state operations for the IKE VCS Bridge.
    VcsState
    The VCS state file (.ike/vcs-state) records the last VCS action performed in a repository.
    VerifyWorkspaceMojo
    Verify workspace manifest consistency and subproject git state.
    WorkspaceReport
    Thread-safe cumulative report writer for workspace goals.
    WsAddMojo
    Add a component repository to an existing workspace.
    WsAlignMojo
    Align inter-component dependency versions in POM files to match the current workspace component versions.
    WsCheckpointDryRunMojo
    Preview a workspace checkpoint without writing files or creating tags.
    WsCheckpointMojo
    Create a workspace checkpoint — build, tag, and deploy every component, then record the resulting checkpoint coordinates in a YAML file.
    WsCreateMojo
    Create a new IKE workspace from scratch.
    WsFixMojo
    Synchronize denormalized workspace.yaml fields with the actual POM values on disk.
    WsHelpMojo
    Displays available ws: workspace goals.
    WsPostReleaseMojo
    Post-release version bump across workspace components.
    WsReleaseMojo
    Workspace-level release — release all dirty checked-out components in topological order.
    WsReleaseNotesMojo
    Generate release notes from a GitHub milestone's closed issues.
    WsRemoveMojo
    Remove a component from the workspace.
    WsSyncMojo
    Synchronize workspace.yaml branch fields with actual git branches.
    WsUpgradeMojo
    Upgrade workspace conventions to the current plugin version.
